data.name: Nudity Beach Simulator 2025
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to a private island where clothing is optional—but connection is everything. In Nude Beach Simulator, you explore a vibrant, open world filled with unique, fully nude NPCs. Each character has their own personality, dialogue, and reactions.

Build trust by flirting. Earn relationship points through interaction and unlock intimate scenes as the connection deepens.

If you're still bored, there are a few mini-games you can play on the beach, such as the ice cream parlor simulator, where you serve ice cream to naked beachgoers, but you have to do it in the right order. Furthermore, there is the possibility of playing soccer against a naked NPC.
data.about_the_game:

If you're still bored, there are a few mini-games you can play on the beach, such as the ice cream parlor simulator, where you serve ice cream to naked beachgoers, but you have to do it in the right order. Furthermore, there is the possibility of playing soccer against a naked NPC.
data.short_description: A seductive 3D adult sandbox where relationships matter. Build trust, flirt, and explore intimate encounters at a sun-soaked nudist beach.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: 64Bit Windows
  • 處理器: i5
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 4GB
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 904 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 64Bit
  • 處理器: i7
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 8GB
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 904 MB 可用空間
